name: SummaryCard
purpose: Provides a recipe-level grouped totals surface with polished hierarchy and a clear next step.
whenToUse: Use when a prototype or product flow needs grouped line items and a summary action.
Use when totals, review steps, or grouped metadata should feel more intentional than a plain list.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for long tables or dense financial screens that need a full data table pattern.
Do not use when a simple paragraph or one-line summary would be clearer.
accessibilityRequirements: Keep summary labels and values concise and readable.
Ensure primary actions clearly describe the next step.
